title: rubus prolongatus
intro: Rubus prolongatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus prolongatus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
